title: Back Our Campaigns - Liberal Democrats
meta_description: Find out more about current Liberal Democrat campaigns
headings: h2: The Liberal Democrats are a campaigning party.
h3: End the scandal of 12-hour A&E waits as 2025 sees worst-ever corridor crisis
h3: Cut fuel duty. Slash rail fares. £1 cap on bus fares.
h3: Back our plan to bring down costs.
h3: Back our plan for a new UK-EU Customs Union
h3: Back our plan for film-style age-rating to ban harmful social media for under 16s.
h3: Stop sewage from being pumped into our rivers, lakes and seas.
h3: Back ensure hospices always have the funding and staff to care for anyone who needs their support.
h3: Support proportional representation so everyone's voice counts.
h2: Stop the Family Farm Tax
h3: Mental health problems affect one in four of us.
h3: Guarantee that all burglaries will be attended by police and investigated.
h2: No to Mandatory Digital ID Cards
h3: The Lib Dem plan to guarantee you can see your doctor quickly.
h3: Carers do a remarkable and important job.
h3: Conversion therapy is offensive, abusive and dangerous.
h3: Find out how we've delivered for communities like yours.
text_excerpt: Back Our Campaigns - Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Take Action Explore Donate Join For Everyone Attend Events Back our campaigns Become a volunteer Vote for us Sign up for email updates Work for us For Members Join from £15/year Attend Conference Become an activist Become a candidate Members' Area Donate Join About Us Our party Our people Latest news In your community What we stand for For a Fair Deal - Manifesto 2024 Our values Our campaigning victories Our Networks Business Network Liberty Network The Future Fund Lib Dem City eXchange Affiliated Organisations Diversity Groups International Donate Join Back our campaigns The Liberal Democrats are a campaigning party. We work hard all year round to get a fair deal for communities. End the A&E Crisis End the scandal of 12-hour A&E waits as 2025 sees worst-ever corridor crisis Join the campaign View Keep Britain Moving Cut fuel duty. Slash rail fares. £1 cap on bus fares. Sign up View No doctors? No Development. Call to action View Halve Your Energy Bill Back our plan to bring down costs. Add your name View Fix Britain's Trade Back our plan for a new UK-EU Customs Union Add your name View Keep Children Safe Online Back our plan for film-style age-rating to ban harmful social media for under 16s. Add your name View Stop Sewage Dumping Stop sewage from being pumped into our rivers, lakes and seas. Add your name View Save Our Hospices Back ensure hospices always have the funding and staff to care for anyone who needs their support. Add your name View Make votes fair Support proportional representation so everyone's voice counts. Add your name View Stop the Family Farm Tax Sign up View Demand Warm Homes Learn more View End Mental Health Injustice Mental health problems affect one in four of us. Learn more View Burglary Response Guarantee Guarantee that all burglaries will be attended by police and investigated. Learn more View No to Mandatory Digital ID Cards Add your name View Stop Labour's Bus Tax Sign up View GP Guarantee The Lib Dem plan to guarantee you can see your doctor quickly. Learn more View Stand up for Carers Carers do a remarkable and important job. Learn more View Ban Conversion Therapy Conversion therapy is offensive, abusive and dangerous. Add your name View Our campaigning victories Find out how we've delivered for communities like yours. Learn more View The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
